MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Ha is present.
Attorney, Philip S. Keith appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, James Nguyen is present.
Attorney, Timothy Moppin representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-03-2009 is vacated.
